get_standata_routine

Source: R/get_standata_routine.R
get_standata_routine.Rd

get_standata_routine

Usage

get_standata_routine(
  service_statistic_df,
  hyper_param,
  time_index,
  geo_unit_index
)

Arguments

service_statistic_df

tibble with iso; admin1 for subnat; routine; sd_routine; routine_roc; sd_routine_roc; year filtered to pop (eg country)

hyper_param

mean and sd hyperparameters for roc data model

time_index

from the model fit

geo_unit_index

from the model fit

Value

list with dat_routine (for plotting) and routine_list (to pass to stan)
